posts.author: Filurisen (Therese)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

We´re working a lot with Item cards per team within our organization and would like to be able to add a Gantt widget as a tab within an Item card in order to display a timeline of all projects associated with that specific annual plan. Today we have a board called “Timeline” that is an overview of all annual plans (teams) but we´d also like to only see the project(s) timeline for a certain annual plan.

Would that be possible or something for a future release?

Kind regards,
Therese
